commented_code:
+name: windows-xp
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [master]
+    paths:
+    - '.github/workflows/windows-xp.yml'
+    - 'toolchains/windows-xp.toolchain.cmake'
+    - 'CMakeLists.txt'
+    - 'cmake/**'
+    - 'src/*'
+    - 'src/layer/*'
+    - 'src/layer/x86/**'
+    - 'tests/**'
+    - 'tools/**'
+    - '!tools/pnnx/**'
+    - 'examples/**'
+    - 'benchmark/**'
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [master]
+    paths:
+    - '.github/workflows/windows-xp.yml'
+    - 'toolchains/windows-xp.toolchain.cmake'
+    - 'CMakeLists.txt'
+    - 'cmake/**'
+    - 'src/*'
+    - 'src/layer/*'
+    - 'src/layer/x86/**'
+    - 'tests/**'
+    - 'tools/**'
+    - '!tools/pnnx/**'
+    - 'examples/**'
+    - 'benchmark/**'
+concurrency:
+  group: windows-xp-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+jobs:
+  windows-xp:
+    name: Windows XP Compatibility
+    runs-on: windows-2022
+
+    env:
+      UseMultiToolTask: true
+
+    steps:
+    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      with:
+        submodules: true
+
+    - name: x86 MinGW (Windows XP compatible)
+      run: |
+        mkdir build-xp-mingw
+        cd build-xp-mingw
+        
+        cmake -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=../toolchains/windows-xp.toolchain.cmake -DNCNN_VULKAN=OFF -DNCNN_SIMPLEOCV=ON -DNCNN_BUILD_TESTS=ON -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release ..
+        
+        cmake --build . --config Release -j 2
+
+    - name: x86 MinGW test (Windows XP compatible)
+      run: |
+        cd build-xp-mingw
+        ctest -C Release --output-on-failure -j 2
+
+    - name: x86 MSVC (Windows XP compatible)
+      run: |
+        mkdir build-xp-msvc
+        cd build-xp-msvc
+        
+        cmake -T v143,host=x64 -A x64 -DNCNN_VULKAN=OFF -DNCNN_SIMPLEOCV=ON -DNCNN_BUILD_TESTS=ON -DNCNN_RUNTIME_CPU=OFF -DNCNN_AVX=OFF -DNCNN_AVX2=OFF -DNCNN_AVX512=OFF -DNCNN_FMA=OFF -DNCNN_F16C=OFF -DNCNN_XOP=OFF -DNCNN_SSE2=ON -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DCMAKE_MSVC_RUNTIME_LIBRARY="MultiThreaded$<$<CONFIG:Debug>:Debug>" ..

discussion_comments.comment_body:
x86_64 package libvulkan.dylib while arm64/universal package libMotenVK.dylib
Can macos x86_64 package really work without moltenvk?

discussion_comments.comment_body:
Recheck the CI logging, and the repairing process didn't copy libMoltenVK.dylib for x86_64 macOS indeed. The Vulkan_INCLUDE_DIR and Vulkan_LIBRARY are specified now in [b7d7e42](https://github.com/Tencent/ncnn/pull/5020/commits/b7d7e42c010dbda1c172532bebd9a34indeedd8cec5a05). The corresponding release test for [b7d7e42](https://github.com/Tencent/ncnn/pull/5020/commits/b7d7e42c010dbda1c172532bebd9a34indeedd8cec5a05) :
https://github.com/Hideousmon/ncnn/actions/runs/6584694265 (libMoltenVK.dylib is copied now for x86_64 macOS)

It's worth noting that the previously built ncnn wheel can function properly with cpu, even without libMoltenVK.dylib on x86_64 macOS. The situation isn't too bad; it's quite promising, haha. 
(https://github.com/Hideousmon/ncnn-gpu-pre-verification/actions/runs/6212630410/job/16862967067 )

discussion_comments.comment_body:
It's this bug. https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/49864

Seems that LLVM 13.0 or higher is required to use SSE to VSX translation in C++ mode, and the CI environment is on LLVM 10.0. I could probably rig cmake to detect this brokenness and disable SSE in such cases, similar to how this PR already checks whether SSE4.1 to VSX translation is broken. That should allow us to re-enable the Clang CI build. Would that be OK?
